Now we can use the bound on `X_plus_Y` to get a bound on `X_plus_Y_sq`.
The coefficients of `X_plus_Y_sq` will be bounded by `2 * (2^53) = 2^54`.
This is less than `2^63`.

```tactics
have h47 : (X_plus_Y_sq[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 63 := by
  have h48 : (X_plus_Y_sq : u64.field.FieldElement51) = (X_plus_Y : u64.field.FieldElement51) ^ 2 := h16
